metadata.description: AWS implementation guides for NIST 800-53 controls

ac-2.title: Enable MFA for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users that have a console password
ac-2.description: Enable MFA for IAM users that have a console password in order to strengthen user authentication.

ac-2.title: Ensure all AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) user groups contain users
ac-2.description: Ensure that all IAM user groups contain users, or remove empty user groups when no longer needed so the groups cannot be used to unintentionally grant access.

ac-2.title: Manage access in AWS by creating policies and attaching them to AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) identities
ac-2.description: Manage access in AWS by creating and attaching IAM policies to ensure that only authorized individuals have access to data and resources.

ac-2.title: Configure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users
ac-2.description: Configure MFA for IAM users to protect resources from unauthorized access.

ac-2.title: Prevent IAM inline policies from using wildcard permissions in both Action and Resource elements
ac-2.description: Restrict IAM inline policies from including 'Effect' 'Allow' with 'Action' '*' over 'Resource' '*' to enforce least privilege access.

ac-2.title: Enforce IAM password policy to require at least one uppercase letter
ac-2.description: Enforces that IAM password policies require at least one uppercase letter in passwords, strengthening authentication security against brute force attacks.

ac-2.title: Enforce strong password policies for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
ac-2.description: Requires IAM user password policies to implement strong configurations, preventing the use of weak passwords and reducing the risk of unauthorized access.

ac-2.title: Enforce IAM password policy to require at least one lowercase letter
ac-2.description: Enforces that IAM password policies require at least one lowercase letter in passwords to strengthen authentication security.

ac-2.title: Ensure IAM users do not have policies directly attached in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
ac-2.description: Enforce IAM users to inherit permissions from IAM groups or roles rather than having inline or managed policies directly attached.

ac-2.title: Restrict IAM inline policies from using wildcard service actions in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
ac-2.description: Restrict IAM inline policies from using 'Effect' 'Allow' with wildcard service actions to enforce least privilege access.

au-2.title: Configure AWS CloudTrail trails to be multi-region
au-2.description: Configure CloudTrail to support multi-Region trails in order to centralize log aggregation of all events for audit log reviews.

au-2.title: Enable security trails in AWS CloudTrail
au-2.description: Enable and create security trails in AWS CloudTrail to retain and protect audit logs of AWS API call activity.

au-2.title: Enable log file validation for AWS CloudTrail logs
au-2.description: Protect log files generated by CloudTrail against tampering or unauthorized modifications in order to support log file integrity and reliability.

au-2.title: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs
au-2.description: Configure CloudTrail to send logs to CloudWatch Logs in order to monitor activity trails and notify when potentially anomalous activity occurs.

au-2.title: Enable encryption for AWS CloudTrail trails
au-2.description: Encrypt all log data generated by CloudTrail while at rest to protect the confidentiality and integrity of the log data stored in CloudTrail.

sc-7.title: Remove unused Amazon EC2 security groups
sc-7.description: Review and remove unused EC2 security groups to reduce complexity in network management and improve network security and performance.

sc-7.title: Do not use default security group rules in Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)
sc-7.description: Change VPC default security groups rules from their default configuration and ensure defaults are not used to prevent unrestricted inbound/outbound traffic.

sc-7.title: Deploy firewalls managed through AWS Network firewalls across multiple Availability Zones
sc-7.description: Deploy firewalls managed through AWS Network firewalls across multiple Availability Zones to provide redundancy, scalability and improved availability.

sc-7.title: Define a default action for handling stateless, fragmented packets in AWS Network Firewall policies
sc-7.description: Define a default action for handling stateless, fragmented packets in Network Firewall policies that match defined control parameters.

sc-7.title: Configure custom TLS policies for listeners on AWS Elastic Load Balancers
sc-7.description: Configure custom TLS policies for listeners on AWS Elastic Load Balancer to customize security settings according to specific requirements and specific cipher standards.

cp-9.title: Backup Amazon Elastic Block Storage (EBS) volumes
cp-9.description: Configure automatic backups for Amazon EBS volumes in order to prevent data loss and support recovery efforts in the event of a disruption.

cp-9.title: Ensure Amazon RDS database instances have automatic backups configured with retention period of at least 7 days
cp-9.description: Require Amazon RDS database instances to have automated backups enabled with a backup retention period greater than or equal to seven days.

cp-9.title: Configure AWS Backup Plan for Amazon S3 resources
cp-9.description: Configure AWS Backup Plan for Amazon S3 resources to mitigate data loss and provide data protection.

cp-9.title: Enable encryption at rest for AWS Backup recovery points
cp-9.description: Enable encryption at rest for AWS Backup recovery points to reduce the risk of unauthorized access to data.

cp-9.title: Configure recovery points for AWS Backup such that they do not expire before the retention period
cp-9.description: Configure recovery points for AWS Backup such that they do not expire before the retention period in order to prevent data loss and meet retention requirements.

sc-28.title: Encrypt data at rest using AWS Key Management Service (KMS) in Amazon DynamoDB
sc-28.description: Encrypt customer data at rest in Amazon DynamoDB using AWS KMS to maintain confidentiality and prevent unauthorized data exposure.

sc-28.title: Ensure Amazon RDS database clusters have encryption at rest configured
sc-28.description: Enforce that Amazon Relational Database Service (RDS) database clusters are configured with storage encryption at rest.

sc-28.title: Ensure Amazon Kinesis data streams have encryption at rest configured
sc-28.description: Enforce server-side encryption for Amazon Kinesis data streams to automatically encrypt data before it is written to storage.

sc-28.title: Prevent public access in AWS KMS key policies
sc-28.description: Configure AWS KMS key policies to prohibit public access to encryption keys. This ensures that KMS keys remain private and accessible only to authorized entities.

sc-28.title: Encrypt Amazon OpenSearch Service node communications
sc-28.description: Encrypt OpenSearch end-to-end node communication by using a secure protocol to protect data from unauthorized disclosure.

cm-2.title: Prevent unauthorized changes to AWS Config settings
cm-2.description: Blocks all users and roles, except the AWS Control Tower service role, from modifying or disabling AWS Config settings across the organization.

cm-2.title: Prevent unauthorized modifications to AWS Config Rules managed by Control Tower
cm-2.description: Blocks all users and roles, except the AWS Control Tower service role, from modifying or deleting AWS Config rules and configuration aggregators.

cm-2.title: Backup Amazon Elastic Block Storage (EBS) volumes
cm-2.description: Configure automatic backups for Amazon EBS volumes in order to prevent data loss and support recovery efforts in the event of a disruption.

si-4.title: Enable EKS Runtime Monitoring in Amazon GuardDuty
si-4.description: Activate Amazon EKS Runtime Monitoring with automated agent management in GuardDuty to detect runtime security threats in Kubernetes clusters.

si-4.title: Identify non-archived security findings in Amazon GuardDuty
si-4.description: Identify non-archived security findings (low/medium/high severity) in Amazon GuardDuty that exceed the configured number of days.

si-4.title: Enable Malware Protection in Amazon GuardDuty
si-4.description: Activate Malware Protection feature in Amazon GuardDuty to detect potential malware in your AWS environment.

sc-12.title: Prevent public access in AWS KMS key policies
sc-12.description: Configure AWS KMS key policies to prohibit public access to encryption keys.

sc-12.title: Ensure AWS KMS key policies limit grant creation to AWS services only
sc-12.description: Restrict AWS KMS key policies to include statements that limit the creation of grants to AWS services only.

sc-12.title: Restrict KMS grant creation to AWS services or AWS service principals only
sc-12.description: Enforce that AWS KMS grants are created exclusively by or for AWS services.

sc-8.title: Configure custom TLS policies for listeners on AWS Elastic Load Balancers
sc-8.description: Configure custom TLS policies for listeners on AWS Elastic Load Balancer to customize security settings.

sc-8.title: Encrypt Amazon OpenSearch Service node communications
sc-8.description: Encrypt OpenSearch end-to-end node communication by using a secure protocol.

sc-8.title: ELBv2 listeners must use HTTPS or TLS encryption for data in transit
sc-8.description: Monitors Application Load Balancer and Network Load Balancer listeners to verify they are configured with HTTPS or TLS termination.

ia-5.title: Remove unused secrets in AWS Secrets Manager
ia-5.description: Remove unused secrets in Secrets Manager to revoke unnecessary access.

ia-5.title: Enable MFA for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users that have a console password
ia-5.description: Enable MFA for IAM users that have a console password in order to strengthen user authentication.

ia-5.title: Configure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users
ia-5.description: Configure MFA for IAM users to protect resources from unauthorized access.

cm-8.title: Enable tagging for AWS AppConfig applications
cm-8.description: Configure required tags for AWS AppConfig applications to support resource tracking, cost allocation, and access control.

cm-8.title: Prevent unauthorized changes to AWS Config settings
cm-8.description: Blocks all users and roles, except the AWS Control Tower service role, from modifying or disabling AWS Config settings.

au-3.title: Configure AWS CloudTrail trails to be multi-region
au-3.description: Configure CloudTrail to support multi-Region trails to centralize log aggregation of all events for audit log reviews.

au-3.title: Enable log file validation for AWS CloudTrail logs
au-3.description: Protect log files generated by CloudTrail against tampering or unauthorized modifications to support log file integrity and reliability.

au-3.title: Enable Amazon S3 data event logging for read operations in AWS CloudTrail
au-3.description: Configure AWS CloudTrail to log all Amazon S3 read data events using multi-Region trails for comprehensive auditing of S3 object-level read activities.

si-3.title: Enable Malware Protection in Amazon GuardDuty
si-3.description: Activate Malware Protection feature in Amazon GuardDuty to detect potential malware in your AWS environment.

si-3.title: Enable Amazon GuardDuty in AWS account and region
si-3.description: Implement intrusion detection (IDS) capabilities by enabling GuardDuty to monitor for and detect suspicious activity.

si-3.title: Enable Amazon EKS Audit Log Monitoring in GuardDuty
si-3.description: Activate Amazon EKS Audit Log Monitoring feature in Amazon GuardDuty for enhanced security monitoring of Kubernetes clusters.

ac-6.title: Prevent IAM inline policies from using wildcard permissions in both Action and Resource elements
ac-6.description: Restrict IAM inline policies from including 'Effect' 'Allow' with 'Action' '*' over 'Resource' '*' to enforce least privilege access.

ac-6.title: Restrict IAM inline policies from using wildcard service actions
ac-6.description: Restrict IAM inline policies from using 'Effect' 'Allow' with wildcard service actions to enforce least privilege access.

ac-6.title: Manage access in AWS by creating policies and attaching them to IAM identities
ac-6.description: Manage access in AWS by creating and attaching IAM policies to ensure that only authorized individuals have access to data and resources.

cm-3.title: Prevent unauthorized changes to AWS Config settings
cm-3.description: Blocks all users and roles, except the AWS Control Tower service role, from modifying or disabling AWS Config settings.

cm-3.title: Send event notifications from AWS CloudFormation stacks to an Amazon SNS topic
cm-3.description: Send event notifications from CloudFormation stacks to an SNS topic to notify personnel of potential security events.

cm-3.title: Prevent unauthorized modifications to AWS Config Rules managed by Control Tower
cm-3.description: Blocks all users and roles, except the AWS Control Tower service role, from modifying or deleting AWS Config rules.

au-6.title: Ensure Amazon CloudWatch alarms cannot be disabled
au-6.description: Ensure Amazon CloudWatch alarms cannot be disabled to allow continuous monitoring and timely responses to critical workloads.

au-6.title: Define retention periods for Amazon CloudWatch Log groups
au-6.description: Define retention periods for CloudWatch Log groups to ensure that stored logs are retained for as long as the business requires.

au-6.title: Enable AWS Security Hub service
au-6.description: Activate Security Hub in the AWS management console and configure the service to receive findings from supported AWS security services.

sc-13.title: Enable encryption for data in transit for Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) endpoint
sc-13.description: Enable encryption for data in transit for Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) endpoint to prevent unintended information disclosure.

sc-13.title: Enable encryption in transit for AWS AppSync API caches
sc-13.description: Configure encryption in transit for AWS AppSync API caches to secure data transmission between services.

sc-13.title: EMR Security Configuration Encryption at Rest Enabled
sc-13.description: Monitors Amazon EMR security configurations to verify that encryption at rest is properly enabled.

au-9.title: Enforce retention policy for log archive in Amazon S3 buckets
au-9.description: Prevents unauthorized modification of lifecycle configurations for Amazon S3 buckets, ensuring data retention policies remain intact.

au-9.title: Prevent policy changes to log archive S3 buckets
au-9.description: Blocks unauthorized modification of bucket policies for long-term archive Amazon S3 buckets to preserve the integrity of audit logs.

au-9.title: Configure AWS CloudTrail logs in Amazon S3 buckets with no public access
au-9.description: Configure the CloudTrail logs S3 bucket with no public access to maintain log integrity and confidentiality.

cm-7.title: Disable automatic assignment of public IP addresses for Amazon VPC subnets
cm-7.description: Disable automatic assignment of public IP addresses for Amazon VPC subnets to prevent instances from being accessed directly from the public Internet.

cm-7.title: Restrict security group public Internet ingress traffic sources for remote access services
cm-7.description: Prevent unauthorized access to EC2 resources by configuring security groups to restrict public Internet ingress traffic sources for remote access services.

cm-7.title: Remove unused Amazon EC2 security groups
cm-7.description: Review and remove unused EC2 security groups to reduce complexity in network management and improve network security.

ac-17.title: Disable public access to Amazon EKS endpoints
ac-17.description: Disable public access to Amazon EKS endpoints to avoid unintentional exposure and access to the cluster.

ac-17.title: Block public access to Amazon S3 buckets
ac-17.description: Configure Amazon S3 to block public access to S3 buckets to protect data from unauthorized access.

ac-17.title: Disable direct internet access for Amazon SageMaker Notebook instance
ac-17.description: Restrict SageMaker Notebook instances from having direct internet access to avoid potential unauthorized access and data exposure.

ir-8.title: Enable AWS Security Hub service
ir-8.description: Activate Security Hub in the AWS management console and configure the service to receive findings from supported AWS security services.

ir-8.title: Enable security trails in AWS CloudTrail
ir-8.description: Enable and create security trails in AWS CloudTrail to retain and protect audit logs of AWS API call activity.

ir-8.title: Create access policies for backup vaults in AWS Backup
ir-8.description: Create access policies for backup vaults in AWS Backup to prevent deletion of recovery point backups stored in the backup vault.

cp-2.title: Enable encryption at rest for AWS Backup recovery points
cp-2.description: Enable encryption at rest for AWS Backup recovery points to reduce the risk of unauthorized access to data.

cp-2.title: Configure recovery points for AWS Backup such that they do not expire before the retention period
cp-2.description: Configure recovery points for AWS Backup such that they do not expire before the retention period to prevent data loss and meet retention requirements.

cp-2.title: Enable a backup plan for Amazon Elastic File System (EFS)
cp-2.description: Enable a backup plan for Amazon EFS to ensure that data is regularly backed up.

cp-4.title: Ensure backup recovery points exists for Amazon Aurora
cp-4.description: Ensure backup recovery points exists for Amazon Aurora to enable restoration.

cp-4.title: Ensure regular recovery points for AWS Backup-Gateway virtual machines
cp-4.description: Configure regular creation of recovery points for AWS Backup-Gateway virtual machines for protection and disaster recovery purposes.

cp-4.title: Create access policies for backup vaults in AWS Backup
cp-4.description: Create access policies for backup vaults in AWS Backup to prevent deletion of recovery point backups stored in the backup vault.

ac-3.title: Configure least privilege access policies in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
ac-3.description: Ensure that access policy permissions explicitly restrict the use of wildcards "*" and "allow all" in AWS IAM in order to enforce least privilege access and prevent unintended or unauthorized access to resources.

ac-3.title: Block public access to Amazon S3 buckets
ac-3.description: Configure Amazon S3 to block public access to S3 buckets in order to protect data from unauthorized access.

ac-3.title: Disable public access to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) endpoints
ac-3.description: Disable public access to Amazon EKS endpoints in order to avoid unintentional exposure and access to the cluster.

ia-2.title: Enable MFA for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users that have a console password
ia-2.description: Enable MFA for IAM users that have a console password in order to strengthen user authentication.

ia-2.title: Configure Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users
ia-2.description: Configure MFA for IAM users to protect resources from unauthorized access.

ia-2.title: Enable MFA for the AWS root account
ia-2.description: Enable MFA for the root account to add an extra layer of protection for the most privileged account.

ir-4.title: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for threat detection
ir-4.description: Enable GuardDuty to continuously monitor for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior to protect AWS accounts, workloads, and data.

ir-4.title: Enable AWS Security Hub for centralized security findings
ir-4.description: Enable Security Hub to aggregate, organize, and prioritize security findings from multiple AWS services and third-party products.

ir-4.title: Configure CloudWatch alarms for security events
ir-4.description: Configure CloudWatch alarms to detect and alert on security-relevant events for rapid incident response.

ra-5.title: Enable Amazon Inspector for vulnerability scanning
ra-5.description: Enable Inspector to automatically discover workloads and continuously scan for software vulnerabilities and unintended network exposure.

ra-5.title: Enable ECR image scanning for container vulnerabilities
ra-5.description: Enable ECR image scanning to identify software vulnerabilities in container images.

ra-5.title: Configure Systems Manager for patch compliance
ra-5.description: Use Systems Manager Patch Manager to automate patching and track patch compliance across EC2 instances.

si-2.title: Automate patching with Systems Manager Patch Manager
si-2.description: Use Systems Manager Patch Manager to automate the process of patching managed instances with security-related updates.

si-2.title: Enable automatic minor version upgrades for RDS
si-2.description: Enable automatic minor version upgrades for RDS database instances to ensure timely application of security patches.

si-2.title: Use latest Lambda runtime versions
si-2.description: Ensure Lambda functions use the latest runtime versions to benefit from security patches and improvements.

sc-20.title: Route 53 Hosted Zones Must Have Tags
sc-20.description: Monitors Amazon Route 53 hosted zones to ensure they have at least one tag applied for resource management and tracking.

sc-20.title: Enable DNSSEC signing for Route 53 hosted zones
sc-20.description: Enable DNSSEC signing for Route 53 public hosted zones to provide authenticated DNS responses and prevent DNS spoofing attacks.

sc-20.title: Configure Route 53 query logging
sc-20.description: Enable query logging for Route 53 hosted zones to monitor DNS queries and detect potential security issues.

sc-21.title: Enable Route 53 Resolver DNS Firewall
sc-21.description: Enable Route 53 Resolver DNS Firewall to filter and block DNS queries to known malicious domains.

sc-21.title: Configure Route 53 Resolver DNSSEC validation
sc-21.description: Enable DNSSEC validation on Route 53 Resolver to validate DNS responses and prevent DNS spoofing.

sc-21.title: Enable GuardDuty DNS protection
sc-21.description: Enable GuardDuty to monitor DNS queries for malicious activity and potential data exfiltration attempts.

ac-1.title: Document IAM policies and procedures
ac-1.description: Maintain documented access control policies that define IAM user management, role-based access, and least privilege principles.

ac-1.title: Use AWS Organizations for policy enforcement
ac-1.description: Implement Service Control Policies (SCPs) in AWS Organizations to enforce access control policies across all accounts.

ac-1.title: Review IAM Access Analyzer findings
ac-1.description: Regularly review IAM Access Analyzer findings to identify unintended access to resources and ensure policy compliance.

au-1.title: Document audit logging policy
au-1.description: Maintain documented audit policy that defines CloudTrail requirements, log retention, and review procedures.

au-1.title: Centralize logs with AWS Organizations
au-1.description: Use AWS Organizations to centralize CloudTrail logs from all accounts into a dedicated logging account.

au-1.title: Implement log retention policies
au-1.description: Configure CloudWatch Logs retention periods and S3 lifecycle policies to meet audit log retention requirements.

cm-1.title: Document configuration management policy
cm-1.description: Maintain documented configuration management policy requiring Infrastructure as Code and AWS Config for compliance monitoring.

cm-1.title: Enable AWS Config in all regions
cm-1.description: Enable AWS Config in all regions to track configuration changes and maintain configuration history.

cm-1.title: Use CloudFormation or Terraform for IaC
cm-1.description: Implement Infrastructure as Code using CloudFormation or Terraform to ensure consistent and auditable infrastructure deployments.

cp-1.title: Document disaster recovery policy
cp-1.description: Maintain documented contingency planning policy that defines RTO/RPO requirements and AWS Backup strategies.

cp-1.title: Implement AWS Backup centralized management
cp-1.description: Use AWS Backup to centrally manage and automate backups across AWS services.

cp-1.title: Configure multi-region replication
cp-1.description: Implement cross-region replication for critical data using S3 replication, RDS read replicas, or DynamoDB global tables.

ia-1.title: Document authentication policy
ia-1.description: Maintain documented authentication policy requiring MFA, password complexity, and federated access via SSO.

ia-1.title: Implement IAM Identity Center for SSO
ia-1.description: Use AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO) to provide centralized authentication and federated access.

ia-1.title: Enforce IAM password policy
ia-1.description: Configure IAM password policy with minimum length, complexity requirements, and rotation periods.

ir-1.title: Document incident response policy
ir-1.description: Maintain documented incident response policy that defines AWS-specific incident handling procedures and escalation paths.

ir-1.title: Enable Security Hub for incident aggregation
ir-1.description: Use Security Hub to aggregate security findings from multiple AWS services for centralized incident detection.

ir-1.title: Configure EventBridge for incident automation
ir-1.description: Use Amazon EventBridge to automate incident response actions based on Security Hub findings and GuardDuty alerts.

ra-1.title: Document risk assessment policy
ra-1.description: Maintain documented risk assessment policy that defines AWS security assessment procedures and risk acceptance criteria.

ra-1.title: Use Security Hub security standards
ra-1.description: Enable Security Hub security standards (AWS Foundational Security Best Practices, CIS AWS Foundations) for continuous risk assessment.

ra-1.title: Review AWS Trusted Advisor findings
ra-1.description: Regularly review AWS Trusted Advisor security recommendations to identify and remediate security risks.

sc-1.title: Document encryption policy
sc-1.description: Maintain documented encryption policy requiring TLS 1.2+ for data in transit and KMS encryption for data at rest.

sc-1.title: Enforce encryption with SCPs
sc-1.description: Use Service Control Policies to enforce encryption requirements across all AWS accounts in the organization.

sc-1.title: Monitor encryption compliance with Config
sc-1.description: Use AWS Config rules to continuously monitor encryption compliance for S3, EBS, RDS, and other services.

si-1.title: Document security monitoring policy
si-1.description: Maintain documented security monitoring policy that defines GuardDuty, Security Hub, and vulnerability scanning requirements.

si-1.title: Enable GuardDuty in all regions
si-1.description: Enable GuardDuty in all regions to continuously monitor for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior.

si-1.title: Enable Inspector for vulnerability scanning
si-1.description: Enable Amazon Inspector to automatically scan EC2 instances, Lambda functions, and container images for vulnerabilities.

ia-3.description: Enable multi-AZ for Network Firewall to support device identification at network boundaries.

ia-3.title: Configure Network Firewall policies
ia-3.description: Configure Network Firewall policies to enforce device authentication requirements.

ac-7.description: Enable MFA for the root account to reduce brute-force and unauthorized access risk.

ac-7.title: Enable hardware MFA for the root account
ac-7.description: Enable hardware MFA for the root account to protect against unauthorized access.
